titleStmt.title: SII 28.112: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 112. (A.R. No. 267 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, east wall, right of entrance.

It records that Tirumārīśvaram-uḍaiyāṉ Karuṇākara-dēvaṉ alias Virāṭarāyaṉ of Īṅgai in Viṟai-kkūṟṟam, in Vikkirama-chōḻa-vaḷanāḍu granted 6(1/2) mā and (1/2) kāṇi of land, which was of his own kāṇi (proprietory holding) in Tirunīṟṟuchchōḻamaṅgalam, separated from Māṟpaḍugai alias Alagya-chōḻa-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam in Tiruvindaḷūr-nāḍu in Rājādhirājavaḷanāḍu, for food-offerings during the service tiru-ppāvāḍai on the day of Pūśam in the month of Tai for God Āḷuḍaiyār and that the king taking note of this endowment, ordered at the request of the endower that this record might be included in the tirukkai-oṭṭi and inscribed in the Kulōttuṅgachōḻan-tirumālikai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ § tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu nālu nāḷ Irunūṟṟaimpatu pallavarāyaṉum tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉum maturāntaka brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku sāmutāyat tirumāḷikaik kūṟu tillai Ampalap pa
llavarayaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaik kūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Āḷuṭaiyār taimmāsattup pūcattu nāḷ tiruppāvāṭai Amutu
ceytaruḷa vikkirama coḻavaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikūṟṟattu Īṅkaikkuṭaiyāṉ tirumāriśvaramuṭaiyāṉ karuṇākaratevaṉāṉa virāṭarāyaṉ rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvintaḷūr nāṭṭu māṟ paṭukaiyāṉa Aḻakiya coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu niṉ
ṟum piṟinta tiruniṟṟuc coḻamaṅkalattu taṉ kāṇiyāṉa tirukkaṭavūrt tirumayāṉamuṭaiyār tirunāmattuk kāṇikku meṟkkum paḻaṅkāveri niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum kāṭapirāṉpaṭṭaṉ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum māmpākkiḻāṉ cerakoṉum paṅkaḷa
rāyaṉum nilattukkut teṟkum Ikkollaikku vaṭakkuk kiḻakkaṭaivatāṉa nilattukku melpāṟkellaiyum vaṭapāṟkellaiyum meṟpaṭiyār nilattukkuk kiḻakkum teṟkum Āka Ivvellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Aṟumāvarai kāṇik
kum sādhanam paṇṇikkuṭuttāṉ Eṉṟum Inta ssādhanam tirukkai Oṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Ippaṭiye kulottuṅka coḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Ivaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ce
yyak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai rājanārāyaṇa muventa veḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai virāṭarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum
prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa ceyyumpaṭip paṭikalveṭṭiyatu
Digital edition of SII 28.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
